snippets.title: Static live region alerts
snippets.html:
info alert:Default live region configuration

This alert uses the recommended liveRegion() modifier to automatically set ARIA attributes and CSS classes.


info alert:Customized live region

You can alternatively omit the liveRegion() to specify ARIA attributes and CSS manually on the containing element.
